## Where to Look for X -- Router Table

| Task | Start Here |
|------|-----------|
| Change dashboard stats | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:106-131` — hybrid stats derivation |
| Fix app name display | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:273-309` — `friendlyAppName()` bundle ID map |
| Add a new dashboard section | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:438` — `generateHTML()`, add after existing sections |
| Change design/colors/fonts | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:438` — CSS is inline in the HTML template |
| Fix API auth | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:24-58` — `fetchApiStats()` reads session.json |
| Change DB query | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:74-91` — main SQLite query |
| Fix CLI output | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:391-434` — `printCLI()` |
| Add new time breakdown | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:145-184` — monthly/dow/hourly aggregation |
| Change share card | `scripts/alltime-recap.js` — html2canvas section in `generateHTML()` |
| Fix date formatting | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:357-387` — date helper functions |
| Add new app mapping | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:276-303` — add bundle ID → display name |
| Change output path | `scripts/alltime-recap.js:19-22` — args parsing + `outDir` |

## Danger Zones

| File/Area | Why It's Fragile |
|-----------|-----------------|
| `fetchApiStats()` session parsing | Reads Wispr Flow's Supabase session.json — format may change with app updates |
| `friendlyAppName()` bundle ID map | Hardcoded map — new macOS apps won't resolve without manual additions |
| SQLite DB schema dependency | Queries `History` table directly — Wispr Flow schema changes break everything |
| html2canvas share card | External CDN dependency loaded at runtime — offline or CDN changes break sharing |
| Inline CSS in `generateHTML()` | ~500 lines of CSS embedded in JS string — no syntax highlighting, easy to break |
